title: Mossel Bay expected to welcome Norwegian cruise ship
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay plans to...
bodyText:
MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay plans to welcome the Norwegian Dawn cruise ship to its harbour today, 27 November.


> The vessel was expected to arrive at 08:30, carrying over 2000 passengers.


Arrival is dependent on weather conditions as well as conditions of the swell, at the captain's discretion.

Passengers will be enjoying the landmarks of Mossel Bay, on their own around town or on pre-planned excursions.

Read more on www.mosselbayadvertiser.com

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
